section: H3:Consent to AI Technology
sentence: We do not use artificial intelligence or other automated decision-making technology for “profiling” or “significant decisions,” as such terms are defined under applicable law, in connection with your personal or household use.

section: H3:Consent to AI Technology
sentence: If you are a job applicant or employee, please refer to our Artificial Intelligence Notice below for information regarding our collection, use, and processing of your personal information, including any use of artificial intelligence or automated decision-making technology in connection with employment decisions. If you are an applicant or cardholder of the Ulta Beauty Rewards credit card, please refer to our partner’s Privacy Policy for information regarding their collection, use, and processing of your personal information.

section: H3:Consent to AI Technology
sentence: However, certain Ulta Beauty services or features, including our chatbot assistant, Ulta AI may also be supported by third-party vendors that utilize artificial intelligence technology. When using a Ulta Beauty feature supported by AI, Ulta Beauty’s AI vendor(s) may record, analyze, or process information in real time and may use and disclose such information for their own purposes, including to improve or train their AI models.

section: H3:Consent to AI Technology
sentence: By using you agree to our Terms and Conditions and consent to the collection, use, analysis, and disclosure of personal information as described in this notice.

section: H3:Consent to AI Technology
sentence: If you do not agree with our terms and/or do not consent to such processing, please do not use the applicable feature.

section: H3:Artificial Intelligence Notice
sentence: If you are a candidate for employment or an employee, Ulta Beauty may use artificial intelligence–enabled tools, including automated or algorithmic systems, in connection with certain employment-related aspects, assessments, or evaluations. These tools may be used for purposes such as recruitment, screening, hiring, promotion, discipline, performance evaluation, or selection for training or advancement, as permitted by law.

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: Ulta Beauty may use one or more AI-enabled systems which may include computational processes that use machine learning, statistical modeling, data analytics, or artificial intelligence and that may be a factor in making employment-related decisions.

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: Where applicable, the AI system(s) may include, but are not limited to:

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: Product or System Name: LinkedIn Recruiter

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: Vendor: LinkedIn

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: Product or System Name: Indeed AI for Recruiting

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: Vendor: Indeed

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: Product or System Name: hireEZ for Sourcing/Recruiting

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: Vendor: HireEZ

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: These tools are intended to assist, and not replace, human decision-making and are used as one factor among others in employment decisions. Ulta Beauty may use additional AI systems, as needed, in addition to these systems.

section: H3:Nature of the AI Systems Used
sentence: All AI-enabled systems are subject to Ulta Beauty’s Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning policy.

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Depending on the role and jurisdiction, AI-enabled tools may assist in evaluating job-related qualifications or characteristics, which may include: Skills, experience, education, and work history

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Depending on the role and jurisdiction, AI-enabled tools may assist in evaluating job-related qualifications or characteristics, which may include: Training, certifications, or licenses

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Depending on the role and jurisdiction, AI-enabled tools may assist in evaluating job-related qualifications or characteristics, which may include: Job-related competencies or performance indicators

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Depending on the role and jurisdiction, AI-enabled tools may assist in evaluating job-related qualifications or characteristics, which may include: Responses to job-related screening questions or assessments

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Depending on the role and jurisdiction, AI-enabled tools may assist in evaluating job-related qualifications or characteristics, which may include: Other lawful, job-related criteria relevant to the position

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: The AI system(s) may be used in connection with all positions at Ulta Beauty.

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Data Collected and Sources of Data

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: In connection with the use of AI-enabled systems, Ulta Beauty may collect, use, or process job-related information, which may include: Information provided directly or indirectly by candidates or employees, such as resumes, applications, employment history, education, skills, or qualifications

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: In connection with the use of AI-enabled systems, Ulta Beauty may collect, use, or process job-related information, which may include: Other employment-related information permitted by law

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: The data used by these systems may be obtained from: Third-party service providers engaged to support employment-related processes, where permitted by law

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Data Retention

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Information collected or processed in connection with AI-enabled employment tools is retained only for as long as reasonably necessary to support employment-related decisions or to comply with applicable legal, regulatory, or recordkeeping obligations, and is handled in accordance with Ulta Beauty’s data retention and information governance practices.

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Requests for Additional Information, Alternatives, or Accommodations

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Where applicable by law, candidates and employees may request a reasonable accommodation related to Ulta Beauty’s use of AI in employment decisions.

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Requests or questions may be directed to: The Associate Care and Support Center at AssociateCareandSupport@ulta.com or 855-478-5821.

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: If a written request for information is received, Ulta Beauty will respond within the timeframe required by applicable law.

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Limits on Disclosure

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: In certain circumstances, Ulta Beauty may be unable to disclose specific information if doing so would violate local, state, or federal law or interfere with a law enforcement investigation.

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Illinois-Specific Notice and Statutory Disclosure

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: Illinois law provides the following regarding the use of artificial intelligence in employment decisions: “775 ILCS 5/2-102(L) – Use of Artificial Intelligence

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: (1) With respect to recruitment, hiring, promotion, renewal of employment, selection for training or apprenticeship, discharge, discipline, tenure, or the terms, privileges, or conditions of employment, it is a violation for an employer to use artificial intelligence that has the effect of subjecting employees to discrimination on the basis of protected classes under this Article or to use zip codes as a proxy for protected classes under this Article.

section: H3:Employment Decisions and Job-Related Criteria Assessed
sentence: (2) It is a violation for an employer to fail to provide notice to an employee that the employer is using artificial intelligence for the purposes described in paragraph (1). The Department shall adopt any rules necessary for the implementation and enforcement of this subdivision, including rules governing the circumstances requiring notice, the timing of notice, and the means of providing notice.”
